topics.title: Bubba Show Incidents and Performance Injuries
topics.summary: The studio discusses a performer's serious wrist injury during a live show, the logistics of construction costs in different regions, and various backstage rumors involving other personalities.

topics.title: Florida Tour Highlights and Injuries
topics.summary: The studio recounts wild moments from a Florida tour, including interactions with local women, an incident involving a fan's toupee, and a medical emergency where a spectator set a broken bone.

topics.title: Live Performance Logistics and Show Highlights
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics of a recent live performance, including audience interactions, technical issues with alcohol service at venues, and humorous anecdotes regarding cast members.

topics.title: Comedy Tour Anecdotes and Backstage Stories
topics.summary: The show features the hosts recounting various incidents from a recent comedy tour, including interactions with fellow comedians, observations of the crew, and humorous stories involving their friends and colleagues.

topics.title: Lung Cancer Awareness and Personal Tributes
topics.summary: The studio hosts a discussion on lung cancer awareness with Dr. Deborah Morrisini, who shares insights into the disease and offers a tribute to the late Dana Reeve.

topics.title: The View and American Idol Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming appearances on The View, the promotion of American Idol contestant Sanjaya, and various topics including celebrity news and personal anecdotes.

topics.title: The View Appearance and Weight Loss Contest
topics.summary: The studio discusses an upcoming appearance on The View, the creation of the show "I'm Smarter Than a Fifth-Grader," and a staff weight loss competition.

topics.title: Weight Loss Contest Results
topics.summary: The studio tracks the progress of several participants in a weight loss competition sponsored by Solaris, noting individual gains and losses before transitioning to a discussion about celebrity lifestyles.

topics.title: Randy Spelling and Sean Stewart Interview
topics.summary: The show features Randy Spelling and Sean Stewart discussing their upbringing as children of wealthy celebrities, their experiences in the entertainment industry, and personal anecdotes regarding past relationships.

topics.title: Rod Stewart's Son Discusses Family and Lifestyle
topics.summary: The studio explores the personal life of Rod Stewart's son, who discusses his upbringing with a distant father, his experiences with substance abuse in rehab, and his relationship with his family.

topics.title: Sons of Hollywood Cast Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts interview reality stars Sean Stewart and Kelly to discuss their personal lives, upcoming television appearances, and experiences with wealth and fame.

topics.title: American Idol and Celebrity Wealth
topics.summary: The studio discusses the success of American Idol contestant Sanjaya Malakar, the wealth of various celebrities including Rod Stewart and John Petroloy, and upcoming segments regarding the lifestyles of wealthy individuals.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Sirius-XM merger in light of market competition, celebrity news regarding Angelina Jolie and John Edwards, and various human interest stories including cruise ship rescues and privacy concerns.

topics.title: Workplace Conflict Over Leave of Absence
topics.summary: The studio records a heated debate regarding an employee's request for a three-week leave to pursue personal interests in Los Angeles while maintaining their current role.

topics.title: Staff Tensions and Current Events News
topics.summary: The studio explores internal workplace friction regarding a staff member's travel plans before transitioning into a news segment covering the Pat Tillman investigation, legal issues involving Alberto Gonzales, celebrity updates on Naomi Campbell and Anna Nicole Smith, and local entertainment listings.
